channel.title: Legen i Norge on Legen-i-Norge
channel.description: Recent content in Legen i Norge on Legen-i-Norge

item.title: How to confirm the education of a medical nurse in Norway?
item.description: Process and requirements for confirming a nursing diploma in Norway

item.title: What is fagprøve for lege in Norway?
item.description: About the medical exam for doctors who want to work in Norway, preparation recommendations, price.

item.title: About project
item.description:
Nesflaten, Norge - Des 2023

The idea came about because doctors outside of EU/EEA have difficulty understanding the process of confirming medical education in Norway. Many things come only when you go through it yourself. Therefore, on this site you will get information from someone who is going through it.

I try to ensure that the information I provide is accurate, but errors are possible. If you see an error, please report it in Telegram.

item.title: How to confirm yours doctors degree in Norway?
item.description: General way of confirming doctors education ouside of EU/EEA country in Norway

item.title: Licence of medical student in Norway
item.description: Requirements to get it, process, cost
